reasoning: The question asks if a country signed the Artemis Accords in June 2025 (between May 30 and July 1, 2025). The background context establishes that Norway was the 55th signatory on May 15, 2025. Official NASA press releases and multiple news sources confirm that Senegal became the 56th signatory on July 24, 2025. Because Senegal was exactly the 56th nation to sign, following Norway (the 55th), no other nations could have signed between May 15 and July 24. Therefore, it is definitively confirmed that no country signed the Artemis Accords in June 2025. The probability is set to the minimum allowed value of 0.02.
